title: rubus vulgaris subsp. lindleyanus
intro: Rubus vulgaris subsp. lindleyanus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a plant species within the Rubus genus. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and fever, due to its health benefits, such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Rubus vulgaris subsp. lindleyanus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used preparations in traditional medicine.
